title: [MTR4] British Rail Mark X
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Note
This is a completely fictional train. Unless otherwise specified, all of the following information should be considered fictional. Users are also allowed to insert their own lores for this train if required.

# Overview
The **British Rail Mark X** _(Mark Cross / Mark X)_ is a type of coaches manufactured between 2003-2006 for Virgin CrossCountry, to allow more services to be provided, and introducing the sleeper service between Aberdeen to Penzance. These coaches are later transferred to CrossCountry by Arriva following the end of the Virgin CrossCountry franchise in 2007.

This resource pack is to add the fictional British Rail Mark X coaches into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2024. The pack also comes with a fictional **Class 67/9** should you need a locomotive to pull these trains.

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, XC Trains Limited.
